Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Short answers before you order — if anything is unclear, use the contact channels in the footer.

items.q: How is PROVIN different from CarVertical or AutoDNA?
items.a: Standard services usually offer one automated report from their own database. PROVIN combines several paid sources, adds listing and seller review, and delivers a summary with comments on the specific car — not just a data dump.

items.q: How long until I get the result?
items.a: We aim to deliver the full analysis within 24 hours of successful payment. If extra time is needed (e.g. rare models or data delays), we’ll let you know.

items.q: What is a VIN and where do I find it?
items.a: The VIN is a 17-character identifier. It’s usually on the windscreen, on the chassis, or in documents. Before ordering, compare the VIN with the listing and photos.
No database is complete. We compare sources and point out where information conflicts or is missing. The conclusion helps you decide but does not replace a workshop inspection or legal advice.
Payment is secure via Stripe. In the form you enter the VIN, listing URL, email (to receive the report), and phone for backup contact.
